Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EVENT HORIZON TECHNOLOGIES' Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, along with a proposed judgment.

Judge: John M. True; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/JMT)
